response:
Brittany needs to calculate the total shampoo required for a leap year which has 366 days and she uses the product every other day so she will use it 183 times with each use being 1/4 ounce resulting in a total of 45.75 ounces needed for the entire year at [store_name].

Since each bottle contains 14 ounces she must divide the total amount by the bottle size to find that she requires 3.27 bottles meaning she must purchase 4 whole bottles to ensure she has enough until [purchase_date].
